details: Dependency-confusion attack. The package @sof-assistant-fe-lib/vertical-faqs@99.9.1 is an empty stub (module.exports = {}) that declares a single dependency fetched from an external URL: hxxps://ltidi[.]storage[.]googleapis[.]com/depenconf/ltidisafe-3[.]2[.]9[.]tgz. When installed, npm downloads and extracts this remote tarball, which can execute arbitrary code. The high version (99.9.1) and scoped name are designed to win dependency resolution against any legitimate internal package with the same name. The package has no repository, no description, and no functional code — its sole purpose is to pull in the remote payload.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
